source_intake_record.raw_question_text: As shown in the figure, $AB$ and $CD$ are chords of the circle $\odot O$, and $AB \parallel CD$. If $\angle AOC = 80^\circ$, what is the measure of $\angle BAD$?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text:
\textbf{Solution:} Since $\angle AOC = 80^\circ$,\\
it follows that $\angle ADC = \frac{1}{2} \angle AOC = 40^\circ$,\\
Since $AB \parallel CD$,\\
it follows that $\angle BAD = \angle ADC = \boxed{40^\circ}$.
